nodes.summary: Create temporary git worktree from upgrade branch HEAD after postcheck exits 0
Run make infra-validate and make blueprint-upgrade-consumer-postcheck inside the worktree with inherited environment
Exit non-zero if either target fails; diff worktree file state vs working tree and include diagnostic divergence list
Register EXIT trap to unconditionally remove the temporary worktree via git worktree remove --force
Exit non-zero and block upgrade if worktree creation fails for any reason
Write structured JSON report to artifacts/blueprint/fresh_env_gate.json and emit inline stdout progress
Worktree created from committed HEAD only; no uncommitted content executed; env inheritance accepted
JSON artifact with required fields; blueprint_upgrade_fresh_env_gate_status_total metric emitted
Gate is idempotent and must not mutate the working tree; EXIT trap ensures worktree cleanup
Failure output identifies diverging files, failing target, exit code, and nature of divergence
Gate exits non-zero with status=fail when bootstrap-managed file absent causes target failure in fresh env
Gate exits 0 with status=pass when all files reproduce correctly and both targets exit 0 in worktree
Gate exits non-zero with status=error when worktree creation fails; upgrade is blocked
EXIT trap removes worktree via git worktree remove --force on SIGINT or SIGTERM
Temporary worktree absent from git worktree list after successful gate run
